name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-bizlive

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-bizlive
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Bizlive SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Bizlive SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-bizlive
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common bizlive
```

documentation:
> ```
> param _EndTime
>
> 结束时间，北京时间，格式：2019-04-28 10:36:00
> ```

结束时间 和 开始时间 必须在同一天内。
: ```
  type EndTime

  str

  param _PlayDomain

  播放域名。

  type PlayDomain

  str

  param _StartTime

  开始时间，北京时间，格式：2019-04-28 10:36:00
  ```

当前时间 和 开始时间 间隔不超过30天。
: ```
  type StartTime

  str

  param _StreamName

  流名称，精确匹配。
  ```

若不填，则为查询总体播放数据。
: ```
  type StreamName

  str
  ```
